mano_cua.result_summary: node-sass v4.9.2 不支持 Apple Silicon arm64 + Node 23，所有 SCSS 文件编译失败（13 个 ERROR）。Webpack 构建失败，播放器核心样式（media_control、container、core 等）全部缺失，无法正常渲染播放器控件。虽然 dev-server 返回 200 但页面不可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: node-sass v4.9.2 incompatible with arm64 + Node 23. All 13 SCSS files failed to compile. Webpack build failed. Player core styles missing. Cannot test media control bar behavior.
